Text20.Name: Text20
Text20.Text: = Number of students against obtained marks have been entered as per their academic information.

Text23.Name: Text23
Text23.Text: = Number of enrolled students in section.

Text25.Name: Text25
Text25.Text: = Number of students (Student strength - Total Appeared).

Text29.Name: Text29
Text29.Text: = Number of students received grade as per their academic information.

Text24.Name: Text24
Text24.Text: = Number of student fall under A+ to E grade

Text30.Name: Text30
Text30.Text: (No of A+ Students * 9) + (No of A Students * 8) + (No of B+ Students * 7) + (No of A Students * 6) + (No of C+ Students * 5) + (No of C Students * 4) + (No of D+ Students * 3) + (No of D Students * 2) + (No of E Students * 1) + (No of F Students * 0) / Total Appeared Student Strength

Text1.Name: Text1
Text1.Text: Subject Wise GPA (Grade Point Average) Report
